title: Build step prompt template with progress checklist
description:
Create internal/wrapup/step_prompt.go with:

1. BuildStepPrompt(step WrapupStep, index int, total int, completed []string) string
   Generates a prompt with:
   - Header: 'Epic Wrapup — Step N of M: <title>'
   - Progress checklist showing completed/current/pending steps
   - The step's prompt text
   - Completion criteria from the verify field
   - Signal instructions: emit <promise>STEP_DONE</promise> when done, <promise>ESCALATE: reason</promise> if cannot complete

2. BuildRetryPrompt(step WrapupStep, previousOutput string) string
   Generates re-prompt when STEP_DONE was not detected:
   - References what the agent was working on
   - Reminds of completion criteria
   - Asks to complete and emit STEP_DONE

Files: internal/wrapup/step_prompt.go, internal/wrapup/step_prompt_test.go
Tests: verify prompt includes progress checklist, correct step numbering, retry prompt references step title.
closed_reason: Created step_prompt.go with BuildStepPrompt and BuildRetryPrompt functions, plus WrapupStep type. BuildStepPrompt generates prompts with header, progress checklist, task prompt, verify criteria, and signal instructions. BuildRetryPrompt generates re-prompts when STEP_DONE was missing. Added comprehensive table-driven tests in step_prompt_test.go.
